entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. studied for quality traits.

entities.name: SEED MASS
entities.description: A quality trait of peanut seeds measured for association with oil and protein contents.

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: A quality trait of peanut seeds measured for association with seed mass and protein content.

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A quality trait of peanut seeds measured for association with seed mass and oil content.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The study of differences in genetic makeup among peanut genotypes.

entities.name: CHARACTER ASSOCIATION
entities.description: The study of the relationship between different quality traits in peanut.

entities.name: GERMPLASM ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic resources of peanut using genotypes with desirable traits.

relationships.description: showed a significant linear increase in graded samples but no significant association among 64 genotypes
